title: xanthisma crutchfieldii
intro: Xanthisma crutchfieldii, also known as Crutchfield's xanthisma or western yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Xanthisma crutchfieldii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support digestive health.
